NewDateTime.title: NewDateTime
NewDateTime.description: The new date and time requested by the user for the appointment.

NewDoctorName.title: NewDoctorName
NewDoctorName.description: The name of the Doctor/Service Resource the user wants to assign (e.g., Dr. Pankaj Singh). Map doctor names here ONLY.

NewHospitalName.title: NewHospitalName
NewHospitalName.description: The name of the Hospital or Service Territory (e.g., Care Hospital). DO NOT put doctor names in this field.

NewStatus.title: NewStatus
NewStatus.description: The new status for the appointment (e.g., Canceled, Scheduled).

NewWorkTypeName.title: NewWorkTypeName
NewWorkTypeName.description: The type of surgery or checkup (e.g., Knee Surgery, Common Cold Checkup).

ServiceAppointmentNumber.title: ServiceAppointmentNumber
ServiceAppointmentNumber.description: The SA number provided by the user. If they provide just a number like '44', pass '44'.
